sections.headline: Problems solved. Results that speak for themselves.
sections.subheadline:
Crystal's work is measured in outcomes, not promises.
Here's how we've helped India's most demanding businesses build, store, move, and process their cold chain.

items.title: Pharma-grade warehouse at JNPT: from brief to live in 90 days
items.challenge: A leading pharmaceutical company needed a fully compliant cold storage and ambient warehouse at JNPT: bonded and non-bonded, pharma-grade, with CFR 21 monitoring. Timeline: 90 days from order to operations.
items.solution: Designed a 40,000 sqft facility with segregated bonded and non-bonded zones, cold and ambient areas, QC room, bond officer facilities, and a full office block. Sourced and installed double-deep racking, WMS hardware, and CFR 21-compliant temperature monitoring. Delivered on time, fully commissioned, audit-ready from day one.
items.outcomes: 40,000 sqft delivered · 4 temperature zones · bonded & non-bonded · CFR 21 compliant · WMS-enabled · live in 90 days

items.title: Cold chain infrastructure for a leading quick commerce platform: 3 cities in 90 days
items.challenge: A fast-growing quick commerce platform needed standardised cold chain infrastructure across multiple cities, fast. Each site had to be SLA-ready from day one, built to the same specification, and operational before the platform launched in each market.
items.solution: Crystal designed a modular, replicable cold chain infrastructure template and deployed it across three cities in parallel. Standardised layouts, pre-approved vendors, and a central project control team ensured every site was delivered on time and to spec.
items.outcomes: 3 cities · under 90 days per site · standardised infrastructure · SLA-ready from day one · replicable to 50+ cities

items.title: Cold storage facility commissioned in 90 days for a leading frozen food manufacturer
items.challenge: A leading frozen food manufacturer needed a dedicated cold storage facility operational within 90 days. The brief covered design, build, commissioning, and full operations from day one, with no tolerance for delays.
items.solution: Crystal delivered end-to-end: site selection, facility design, construction, refrigeration commissioning, WMS deployment, and staff training. The facility went live within 90 days, fully operational and compliant.
items.outcomes: Delivered in 90 days · end-to-end execution · WMS-enabled · fully operational from day one

sections.headline: Cold chain intelligence. From the people who build it.
sections.notes: Blog content to be developed over time. Each post should be 600-1000 words, written from operational expertise. Target: one post per two weeks at launch, weekly once established.
